name: Blood of Terramorphous
description: A legendary Eridian relic built entirely around sustain, offering the strongest health regeneration available on any relic. Its regeneration increases with the relic's level and outpaces Blood of the Seraphs for pure healing over time, even after factoring in that relic's bonus health.
notes:
It drops rarely from Terramorphous the Invincible at Terramorphous Peak.

Its regeneration scales by level, reaching 1.8% of maximum health per second at level 90. If you collect the other Terramorphous items, their red text lines combine with this one to form a short poem.

special.description: Adds constant health regeneration that increases with the relic's level.
special.title: His blood could inspire...
